name: Richard Simmons
title: Last known photo of Richard Simmons, a self-portrait he took at home on the night of July 12, 2024, intended for his next morning's social media post.
description: This is the last known photograph of Richard Simmons, a self-portrait he took at his home on the night of July 12, 2024, his 76th birthday. He intended to share it the next morning with the caption: “Let me fly you to the moon, so we can gaze upon the stars.” Simmons was found unresponsive at his home in the Hollywood Hills the following day, July 13, 2024. The Los Angeles County coroner ruled the death accidental, citing complications from a fall combined with heart disease. His staff later posted the image and his intended caption on his social accounts. Simmons was 76 years old.
bio: Richard Simmons was an American fitness instructor, actor, and television personality. He rose to fame in the 1980s with his flamboyant, high-energy Sweatin' to the Oldies workout videos and his frequent appearances on daytime television, becoming one of the most recognizable promoters of weight-loss culture in the United States. He largely retreated from public life in early 2014 and rarely appeared in public during the final decade of his life.

location.name: Home of Richard Simmons, 1350 Belfast Dr, Los Angeles, CA 90069
